title: Dark Souls Expansion
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae86f699a85f84f1bb8dbc3a79a6990d9306af0f_0.webp)

                                          About Dark Souls Expansion

The FazBrick Studios Team presents Dark Souls Expansion. Maintained and kept up to date for modern versions of Minecraft and fully compatible with multiplayer.

This project focuses on transforming the Minecraft game into the look and feel of From Software games without losing the original essence of the Vanilla game. Dark Souls Expansion features a huge variety of weapons, structures, enemies and content to ensure a completely immersive and enjoyable experience for the user.

This mod adds a new dimension called Lordran where most of the user's gameplay time will be based. In this new dimension you will be able to explore and face new enemies and bosses while upgrading your weapons, armor and spells.

The mod is currently in the early stages of development and will be constantly updated adding new content and advancing versions.

                                        I can put this in Modpacks?
Of course! Feel free to add this mod to your modpacks. I encourage you to do so, just don't forget to give credit.

                                             What's in the Mod
The Dark Souls Expansion consists of a large number of structures and dungeons on which the exploration of these and the obtaining of improvement resources and equipment will be completely based.

Currently the project includes:

Undead Burg Dungeon

Undead Parish Dungeon

Sen's Fortress

Sanctuary Structure

Undead Asylum Dungeon and Boss

Blacksmith Andre Station and new trading system by souls

More than 45 new weapons with animations

More than 15 new armor sets ispired in the series

New Lordran Dimension

More than 20 new creatures

And a lot more!

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a41431f4e3b16cc6fbd9bb85a0b1bb96d709c99_0.webp)

                                              Getting Started
 
To begin your adventure you will have to find eight ruin fragments scattered around the world in a new structure known as Gravestone Yard. By joining these fragments with an Undead Soul you can obtain Artorias Crest.
This same object will be key to travel to Lordran since it will be the key that we will have to deposit in the new churches that we will find in the world. Once the key is entered, it will take us to Lordran and from there we can explore the world at our leisure and find new structures and enemies.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5a680094339c7f861ed7add6d9629613374eb9a_0.webp)
 
While in Lordran we will have 3 new main structures that we can loot and face their respective bosses. One of these is the blacksmith house which we will use to buy new weapons and items from the blacksmith in exchange for souls. To enable this function we will have to give the blacksmith a Large Amber.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2833d6992aa26ec9221948aa5bc879836a93bdf5_0.webp)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e0be75e5bf3cc1a1f9f19c4caa82d537b615d53_0.webp)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a292cb296df37ae6664834aa519c54d61e21723_0.webp)

🗡️ Start your Dark Souls journey instantly! With 1-click server installation powered by Nitrado and Apex Hosting, you and your friends can dive into the brutal world of Dark Souls Expansion in no time!

To get started, all you need is a Minecraft Java server with at least 4GB of RAM or more (recommended for smoother gameplay with multiple players). With just one click from your control panel, you can instantly install Dark Souls Expansion [CurseForge] and begin your perilous adventure today!
